description: SigmaBoy trading swarm orchestrator - runs 5-minute trading cycles
prompt: Run the SigmaBoy 5-minute trading cycle. Read decision-log.json to check if a cycle is in progress. If IN-PROGRESS, log SKIPPED and exit. Otherwise, generate a new cycle_id (format: SB-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-UTC), initiate signal fetch, wait for risk verdict, and if approved, trigger execution. Log all outcomes to decision-log.json.
notes: Overlap protection: if a cycle is still running when the next trigger fires, skip that trigger entirely
On timeout: log ABORTED-SCHEDULER-TIMEOUT to decision-log.json and release the lock
Status file: workspace/swarm-state/decision-log.json tracks cycle state
